title: Waste Management (WM)Intrinsic Value
description: A transparent, step-by-step discounted cash flow valuation of Waste Management (WM). Using actual financials to arrive at a single fair value estimate for WM shares.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
WM enjoys strong pricing power due to localized monopolies (landfills). A 7% growth rate is conservative but realistic, reflecting organic volume growth, steady price increases, and investments in recycling and renewable natural gas.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
Given a 10Y Treasury yield of 4.18%, a 7.5% discount rate implies an equity risk premium suitable for a highly defensive, utility-like business. WM's revenue is highly visible and resilient to economic downturns.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
WM enjoys strong pricing power due to localized monopolies (landfills). A 7% growth rate is conservative but realistic, reflecting organic volume growth, steady price increases, and investments in recycling and renewable natural gas.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
